title: Cloud Ghost Raindrop
definition: The observation that each raindrop from a cloud carries the horizontal velocity of the cloud and falls at an angle relative to the ground, effectively becoming a 'ghost' of the cloud.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The observation that each raindrop from a cloud carries the horizontal velocity of the cloud and falls at an angle relative to the ground, effectively becoming a 'ghost' of the cloud.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The observation that each raindrop from a cloud carries the horizontal velocity of the cloud and falls at an angle relative to the ground, effectively becoming a 'ghost' of the cloud.
difficulty_levels.expert: Every raindrop is a tiny, fleeting echo of the cloud it originates from, carrying its motion in a diagonal trajectory.

extra_fields.insight: Every raindrop is a tiny, fleeting echo of the cloud it originates from, carrying its motion in a diagonal trajectory.
